title: Confidential annex to Lebanon-Israel security deal revealed

snapshot.title: Confidential annex to Lebanon-Israel security deal revealed
snapshot.description: DUBAI: A confidential security annex to the Lebanon-Israel framework agreement has revealed new details of how the US-brokered deal is intended to be implemented, according to a document obtained by Asharq Bloomberg. The six-part annex outlines security arrangements, including the disarmament of Iran-backed Hezbollah and other armed groups, the deployment of the Lebanese Armed
snapshot.author: Arab News
snapshot.pageTitle: Confidential annex to Lebanon-Israel security deal revealed | Arab News
